flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pueblo Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pueblo Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.0k → $17.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pueblo Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pueblo Community College rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 (19.3% → 30.7%).
